commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: The Divinity is not angry, as some suppose, but when he makes so many threats he is only making an appeal and showing humankind the things that are to be accomplished. Such a procedure is surely good, for it instills fear to keep us away from sin. .

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Arrows. Pestilence, famine, war, sickness, and death, are termed the arrows of God.
